name: clawdmeter-apns-gateway
description: Clawdmeter APNS gateway (Group E5) — holds operator .p8, signs APNS JWT (ES256), forwards encrypted push payloads to Apple. Per design doc docs/design/secure-relay-apns-2026-05-26.md + D21 mitigation suite + codex #4 ops model + codex #5 device-token egress controls.
